steps.title: Use the tangent ratio
steps.content:
From angle $L$, tangent is opposite over adjacent:
$$
\tan L=\frac{JK}{LK}=\frac{3}{4}
$$
So the legs are in a $3:4$ ratio.

steps.title: Scale the right triangle
steps.content:
A right triangle with legs in a $3:4$ ratio has hypotenuse ratio $5$. The figure gives hypotenuse $LJ=90$, so the scale factor is
$$
\frac{90}{5}=18
$$

steps.title: Find the opposite side
steps.content: $JK$ corresponds to the $3$ side, so $$ JK=3(18)=54 $$ The answer is C.
